description: An original family-friendly 2D platformer hero sprite.
character_notes: An original cheerful plumber-like platformer hero with a round cap, work overalls, white gloves, expressive face, and compact mascot proportions; not a copyrighted character.
style_notes: Bright colors, rounded readable shapes, simple face, clean outline, animation-ready silhouette.

animations.name: idle
animations.action: friendly idle breathing and blink loop

animations.name: jump
animations.action: squash anticipation, airborne jump, landing settle

animations.name: attack
animations.action: simple action gesture without a weapon
